title: bouhlet0/cve-rag
summary: CVE情报的混合检索增强生成系统，结合BM25和向量搜索通过互逆排名融合，实现本地LLM推理、幻觉验证，并基于FastAPI提供服务。
description: Hybrid retrieval-augmented generation system for CVE intelligence combining BM25 and vector search via Reciprocal Rank Fusion, with local LLM inference, hallucination validation, and FastAPI-based serving.
